div.class: o_action_manager pdp-workspace h-100 w-100 d-flex flex-column
bg-white border-bottom p-2 d-flex align-items-center gap-3 shadow-sm

span.class: text-muted ms-2 px-2 py-1 bg-light border rounded small

div.style: flex: 0 0 auto; width: 75%; resize: horizontal; min-width: 200px; max-width: calc(100% - 150px);

div.class: d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center p-1 border-bottom bg-light
flex-grow-1 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center overflow-hidden p-1 position-relative
position-absolute top-0 end-0 p-2 z-1 fw-bold
position-relative h-100 w-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
position-absolute bottom-0 start-0 end-0 d-flex justify-content-center gap-2 pb-1

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border opacity-75 text-danger

div.class: position-absolute top-0 start-0 m-2 p-2 bg-white border shadow-sm

input.class: form-control form-control-sm p-0 px-1 border-0 border-bottom rounded-0
form-control form-control-sm p-0 px-1 border-0 border-bottom rounded-0

div.class: position-relative h-100 w-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
position-absolute bottom-0 start-0 end-0 d-flex justify-content-center gap-2 pb-1

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border opacity-75 text-danger

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
d-flex align-items-center gap-2 p-2 border rounded

div.style: height: 6px; cursor: ns-resize; background: #ccc; flex: 0 0 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; user-select: none;
div.title: Drag to resize

div.style: flex: 0 0 auto; height: 50%; overflow: hidden; min-height: 80px;

ul.class: nav nav-tabs px-2 pt-1 bg-light border-0

a.t-attf-class: nav-link py-1 px-3 text-dark border-0 rounded-top {{ state.activeTab === tab[0] ? 'bg-white border-top border-start border-end fw-bold' : '' }}

div.div: Select a product to view details.

div.class: bg-secondary text-white fw-bold px-2 py-1 mb-2 text-center small rounded-1

table.class: table table-sm table-bordered mb-0 text-end align-middle

div.class: col-12 d-flex gap-3 align-items-center pb-1 border-bottom mb-1

input.t-attf-class: form-control form-control-sm p-0 text-center {{ !sr._stoneValid and sr._stoneCode ? 'border-danger' : '' }}

tr.td: No stones. Click "+ Add" to add a stone.

div.p: Models that match the look of your product for a set (ring + earrings + pendant).

div.class: bg-light border-top p-2 d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-light border px-3 text-danger
btn btn-sm btn-primary border px-3 fw-bold
btn btn-sm btn-light border px-3 text-primary
btn btn-sm btn-light border px-3 text-secondary

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center px-3 py-2 border-bottom bg-light

div.div: Please select information to be copied.

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center

button.class: btn btn-close btn-close-white position-absolute top-0 end-0 m-4

img.style: max-width: 90%; max-height: 90%; object-fit: contain; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
max-width: 90%; max-height: 90%; object-fit: contain; box-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);

div.class: position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center px-3 py-2 border-bottom bg-light
px-3 pt-2 pb-2 d-flex gap-3 align-items-center border-bottom bg-light

button.class: btn btn-sm btn-outline-primary py-0 px-2 ms-2

div.class: fw-bold small mt-3 mb-1 border-bottom pb-1

select.option: is less than or equal to
is more than or equal to

div.class: px-3 py-2 border-top bg-light d-flex justify-content-end
position-fixed top-0 start-0 w-100 h-100 d-flex align-items-center justify-content-center
d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center px-3 py-2 border-bottom bg-light
